titleStmt.title: SII 9.198: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 198. (A.R. No. 105 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP ON THE NORTH SIDE OF THE MALE-MALLAPPA TEMPLE AT BAGALI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 44, Vikāri, Bādubey-amāvāsye (i.e., Vaiśākha amāvasyā), Ādivāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1119 May 11, Sunday, on which day there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva whose feudatory Tribhuvanamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was governing Noḷambavāḍi thirty-twothousand. Under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Mahadēvarasa, the Mahāmātya and Daṇḍanāyaka Ṛishiyaṇṇabhaṭṭa is said to have made a gift of toll-revenue for the service of the god Nīlēśvaradēva, after washing the feet of Nīlēśvara-Paṇḍita, son of Dēvasiṅgajīya. The Mahājanas of the village contributed one paṇa every month for a lamp, besides some land. The Pergaḍe Kāvarāja is also said to have made a gift of one gadyāṇa out of the two gadyāṇas which the Mahājanas used to pay him as a present on every Dīpāvali day, for the service of the same god.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūḷastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara
paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigata
pamcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbara
dyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ paricchēdi
gaṇḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamalla
pāṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramuṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭa
pratipāḷana(ṁ)mmāḍi sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire © samadhigatapaṁca
mahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka śiṣṭēṣṭajanā
bhīṣṭapadapradāyakaṁ niyōgayōgandharaṁ patikāryyadhurandharaṁ
sāhasōttuṁgaṁ tribhuvanamalladēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmādisamasta
praśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānanaccupannā yadadhiṣṭhāyakaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ
daṇḍāyada mahadēvarasara besadiṁ svasti samastarājyabharanirū
pitamahāmāttyapadavīvirājamānamānōnnataprabhumaṁtrōtsā
haśaktitrayasaṁpannarappa śrīmaddaṇḍanāyakaṁ riṣiyaṇnabhaṭṭaru svasti
śrīcāḷukyavikramavarṣada 44 neya vikārisaṁvatsarada bādu
beyamāvāsyeyādivāraṁ sūryyagrahaṇadaṁdu bhaktajanaci(ṁ)ntāmaṇi
yappa śrīmaddibyaliṁgaṁ nīlēśvaradēvara nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegaṁ tiṁgaḷiṁgeyoṁdele
ya pēṟina suṁkamaṁ dēvasiṁgajīyara putraṁ nīlēśvarapaṇḍitadēvara kālaṁ
karcci dhārāpūrbbaka(ṁ)mmāḍi koṭṭaṁ mattaṁ samastavastuguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadū
roḍeyapramukhamahājanamayvadiṁbarumasēṣaṁ ne
radirddu keṟeya suṁkadoḷage naṁdādīvigege tiṁgaḷiṁgeyoṁdu paṇamaṁ naḍeyisu
varu mattaṁ hiṭṭanahaḷḷiyalu biṭṭa kisuvina mattareraḍu © mattaṁ pāṇḍya
dēvara besadiṁdiṟdu samastavastuguṇagaṇāḷaṁkāracārucāritranaya
vinayasīlācārasaṁpannarappa śrīmatparggaḍe kāvarājaṁ tavage dīpāvaḷiyaparbba
dalu mahājana Udalukuḍuva gadyāṇa Eraḍaṟoḷage dēva
raṁgabhōgakke biṭṭa gadyāṇa 1 I dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge prayāgevā
raṇāsikurukṣētradoḷu sāsirbbarvvēdapāragargge sāsira kavileyanubha
yamukhigoṭṭa phalamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidātanā puṇyasthānadoḷa
nitu kavileyumanā brāhmaṇarumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku .
© svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭā
yāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . saṁdātātsumahatsakhyaṁ duḥkhamanyatra pā
lanaṁ dānaṁ vā pālanaṁ vēti dānātśrēyōnupālanāt .
Digital edition of SII 9.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
